message:
test(runtime): add env/TOML configuration precedence tests

Add comprehensive test coverage for the RuntimeBuilder configuration
loading pipeline (169 new lines):

- with_env_overrides_applies_env_vars: verify ASUPERSYNC_WORKER_THREADS
  and ASUPERSYNC_POLL_BUDGET are read and applied
- programmatic_overrides_env_vars: confirm that .worker_threads(2)
  called after .with_env_overrides() takes precedence over
  ASUPERSYNC_WORKER_THREADS=8
- with_env_overrides_invalid_var_returns_error: verify that a non-
  numeric value in ASUPERSYNC_WORKER_THREADS produces an Err
- with_env_overrides_no_vars_uses_defaults: verify that with no env
  vars set, RuntimeConfig::default() values are preserved

Config-file-gated tests (cfg(feature = "config-file")):
- from_toml_str_builds_runtime: parse TOML and verify worker_threads
  and poll_budget
- from_toml_str_with_programmatic_override: TOML says 8, .worker_threads(2)
  overrides to 2
- from_toml_str_invalid_returns_error: malformed TOML returns Err
- precedence_programmatic_over_env_over_toml: full three-layer test
  (TOML=16, env=8, programmatic=2 -> 2)
- precedence_env_over_toml: two-layer test (TOML=16, env=8 -> 8)

Includes with_envs() and clean_env() test helpers for deterministic
environment variable management.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
